chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-1796 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For hearing of M.A. 10238/2016 3. For hearing of main case 08.08.2023 Mr. Rafique Ahmed Dahri AAG Sindh. ----- This petition is pending since 2016. It is urged that petitioner being representative of All Pakistan Clerks Association has filed this petition invoking the jurisdiction of this Court seeking repatriation of the stenographers to their parent cadre by declaring the impugned notification of 19.05.2016 as illegal, null, void ab initio. The Association was formed for the welfare of their members, however, this petition was not filed by the Clerks’ Association rather it was filed by an individual. It is only mentioned in the body of the petition that he is the president of All Pakistan Clerks Association. It is almost 7 years since this petition was filed wherein the promotion orders are being objected. All those who could be aggrieved of any order have also not been arrayed as party to this petition. Today no one is in attendance on behalf of petitioner. The petition is dismissed. JUDGE JUDGE
